--- 
title: Metadata features comparison
---


<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vRmc4elzevTZ-K4MQD0TPft8Yx5xuAXfjj0FeUX22ExStJkhsCV3mAhEPzLGkE2hFt99IvVW_SCLMnJ/pubhtml?gid=1058089999&amp;single=true&amp;widget=false&amp;headers=false&chrome=false&range=A1:L16" width="100%" height="400px"></iframe>
